name: Boone Links Golf & Event Center
about: Boone Links Golf & Event Center is a 27-hole public golf course located in Florence, Kentucky, designed by Robert Von Hagge. The venue is part of the Boone County Golf municipality and is known for its challenging layout that accommodates all skill levels. It features golf simulators, a mini-golf course, and event space, offering a comprehensive golf and social experience. The facility provides fair rates and great conditions, making it a valuable option for locals and visitors in the Cincinnati area.
why_golfers_like_it: Two 4K HD golf simulators for a premium indoor experience
Convenient location near Cincinnati and the airport
Hosts leagues and tournaments for competitive play
Combines golf with food and drinks in a relaxed atmosphere

food_and_drink.notes: On-site kitchen with food service available
Full bar service in the simulator lounge and pub area

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers an on-site kitchen and full bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Typically, it takes about 1-2 hours to play 18 holes on the simulator, depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf programs and mini-golf, making it suitable for families with children.
